hooks.command: CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)}"; ROUTER_RS_LAUNCHER="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/scripts/router-rs/run_router_rs.sh"; ROUTER_RS_MANIFEST="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/scripts/router-rs/Cargo.toml"; if [ ! -x "$ROUTER_RS_LAUNCHER" ]; then echo "Missing required router-rs launcher: $ROUTER_RS_LAUNCHER" >&2; exit 1; fi; "$ROUTER_RS_LAUNCHER" "$ROUTER_RS_MANIFEST" --claude-host-hook-command config-change --repo-root "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"
